Based on the search results, I found relevant information about Techman Robot's TMflow vision capabilities. Here's what I discovered:

## TMflow Vision Node Overview

In TMflow, the vision function (TMvision) is built as a node which you can call out and add it anywhere in your project flow.

## Color Detection Capabilities

TMvision supports barcode/QR Code/2D DataMatrix reading, color classification and string matching. Additionally, the built-in vision system includes color classification capabilities.

The deep learning technology of AI is combined in order to accurately sense the shape, type, and color of an object.

## Vision Node Features

The Vision node provides the creation of a plane with fixed-point type, servo type, and object type as well as a variety of AOI identification functions.

## Integration with AI Vision

AI Vision is a series of extension features and products that integrate seamlessly with your existing TMflow Vision Node, offering enhanced capabilities for various automation tasks.

The search results don't contain specific information about LED indicators on the vision node itself. If you're looking for more detailed technical specifications about LED functionality or indicators, you may want to consult the official TMflow documentation or contact Techman Robot directly.

To use vision functionality in TMflow, you drag the Vision node from the nodes menu onto the project flow. 

TMvision is a process-oriented user interface where you can follow software instructions and stack up the function process step-by-step.

For programming color detection specifically, TMvision contains several task designer functions including Visual Servoing, Fixed Point, AOI-only, Vision IO, Landmark Alignment, Object-based Calibration, and Smart-Pick, which can be used according to your needs.

Based on the search results, I found relevant information about TMflow vision AOI nodes and related functionality. Here's what I discovered:

## TMflow Vision AOI Node Capabilities

The Vision node provides the creation of a plane with fixed-point type, servo type, and object type as well as a variety of AOI identification functions.

TMvision contains the following task designer functions: Visual Servoing, Fixed Point, AOI-only, Vision IO, Landmark Alignment, Object-based Calibration, and Smart-Pick.

## Node Types and Applications

AOI and Vision IO applications can be set up through an Inspection node. Tasks that are set up through a Positioning node are categorized as: Object Positioning, Landmark Positioning, Servoing, Landmark Positioning Object-based Calibration, and Smart-Pick.

## Recent Software Versions

The search results show documentation for TMflow Version 2.20 (released December 16, 2024) and references to earlier versions like 2.18 and 2.16, which align with your 2023-2024 timeframe.

While the search results provide general information about TMflow's vision nodes and AOI capabilities, they don't specifically detail color blob and LED detection features or comprehensive node lists. For more detailed information about specific color blob detection and LED detection nodes, you may want to consult the official TMflow software documentation directly or contact Techman Robot support.

Based on the search results, here's information about the Techman Robot TMvision color vision node and AOI usage:

## Vision Node and AOI Functions

The Vision node provides the creation of a plane with fixed-point type, servo type, and object type as well as a variety of AOI identification functions.

## TMvision Capabilities

TMvision supports contrast enhancement, image smoothing & thresholding, morphology, color plane extraction and image flipping. Additionally, it supports barcode/QR Code/2D DataMatrix reading, color classification and string matching.

## TMvision Edge Support

Once installed, it enables the IPC to connect to the camera and unlocks TMvision functions on the IPC to perform a variety of vision tasks including object identification, image enhancement, measuring, etc.

## Vision Node Setup in TMflow

Users should create a Vision task project of TMflow software, and then drag the Vision node from the nodes menu onto the project flow.

If you need more detailed documentation about specific AOI settings or usage procedures, you may want to consult the official Omron TM Collaborative Robot TMVision Software Manual, which contains detailed specifications on AOI settings and color plane extraction functions.

Here's what I found:

## TMflow Vision Job Structure

Inspection nodes can be set up for AOI and Vision IO applications. The Vision node provides creation of planes with fixed-point type, servo type, and object type as well as a variety of AOI identification functions.

## Creating a Vision Node

To set up an AOI task, you create a Vision task project in TMflow software and then drag the Vision node from the nodes menu onto the project flow. You then click the AOI-only icon and follow steps related to accessing TM Robot HMI settings.

## Available Vision Features

AI Vision integrates with TMflow Vision Node and includes functions such as incoming part positioning, barcode reading, dimension measurement, and visual inspection.

Unfortunately, the search results don't contain specific programming examples showing how to implement or configure a "color" inspection function within an AOI node. For detailed code examples and specific color inspection node parameters, you may want to consult the official TMflow documentation directly or contact Techman Robot support, as such implementation details may be found in more specialized technical documentation or tutorials.

The search returned results about TMvision software and related vision concepts. Here's what I found:

## TMvision Vision Job with AOI Functions

The AOI-only identification is applicable to EIH or ETH to read Barcode and QR code, Color Classifier, and String Match without workspace and base system output.

### Color Classifier Usage

Users select the color classification area and select the color feature area for identification before clicking Next to initiate the training process. Users are required to place patterns of different colors as prompted and name each color during the training process. Once trained successfully, the TMvision can classify color of the object to its most suitable category.

### Setting Up AOI-Only Jobs

To use this function, enter the TMvision Task Designer and select the AOI-only to use this function. The AOI-only identification is applicable to EIH or ETH for you to read the barcode, QR-code and color classification, etc, without workspace and base system output.

The search results provide documentation from official Omron/Techman Robot TMvision manuals. However, the results focus on general AOI functions and Color Classifier training, but don't include specific detailed examples for "Color Blob" or "Brightness Check" functions in the Korean language context you specified. For more comprehensive usage examples specific to those functions, you may want to consult the complete TMvision Software Manual directly or contact Techman Robot support.

content.text:
충분한 정보를 수집했습니다. 정리합니다.

---

## TM Flow / TMvision 색상(Color) 감지 관련 비전 노드

### TMflow에서의 비전 노드 구조

TMflow에서 비전 기능은 **Vision 노드** 하나로 진입하며, 내부에서 TMvision Task Designer를 통해 세부 기능을 구성합니다.

```
[TMflow 프로젝트 플로우]
  └─ Vision 노드 (드래그 앤 드롭으로 추가)
       ├─ Positioning 작업  (물체 위치결정)
       └─ Inspection 작업   (AOI 검사)
```

---

### Vision 노드의 작업 유형 (Task Type)

| 작업 분류 | 하위 유형 | 설명 |
|-----------|-----------|------|
| **Positioning** | Fixed Point | 고정 기준점으로 위치결정 |
| | Visual Servoing (Servo) | 시각 서보 |
| | Landmark Positioning | 랜드마크 기반 위치결정 |
| | Smart-Pick | 스마트 픽 |
| **Inspection (AOI-only)** | **Color Classifier** | 색상 분류/감지 |
| | Barcode / QR Code | 바코드, QR 코드 읽기 |
| | 2D DataMatrix | 데이터매트릭스 읽기 |
| | String Match | 문자열 매칭 |
| **Vision IO** | AOI + IO 출력 | AOI 결과를 IO로 출력 |

---

### Color Classifier (색상 감지) 노드 사용법

색상/LED 감지는 **AOI-only** 모드 안의 **Color Classifier** 기능을 사용합니다.

#### 설정 절차

1. TMflow 프로젝트에서 **Vision 노드**를 플로우에 드래그
2. Vision 노드 진입 후 **AOI-only** 아이콘 선택
3. Task Designer에서 **Color Classifier** 선택
4. **색상 분류 영역(ROI)** 을 화면에서 지정
5. 각 색상 패턴을 카메라 앞에 배치하며 **학습(Training)** 수행
   - 색상마다 이름을 지정 (예: `RED`, `GREEN`, `LED_ON`, `LED_OFF`)
6. 학습 완료 후 저장 → Vision Job 생성
7. TMflow에서 Vision 노드 실행 결과값으로 분류된 색상명이 변수로 반환됨

#### 반환 변수 활용 예시 (TMflow 스크립트)

```
// Vision 노드 실행 후 결과 변수 확인
var colorResult = Vision.Result   // "RED", "GREEN" 등 학습된 이름

if colorResult == "LED_ON" then
    // LED가 켜진 경우 처리
else
    // LED가 꺼진 경우 처리
end
```

---

### LED 감지 적용 방법

LED ON/OFF 감지는 별도 "LED 노드"가 존재하지 않습니다. **Color Classifier**를 응용합니다.

- 학습 레이블 예시: `ON` (밝은 상태), `OFF` (어두운 상태)
- 또는 **Brightness** 기반으로 판별하려면 Color Classifier의 ROI를 LED 위치에 정확히 설정

---

### AOI-only vs Vision IO 차이

| 구분 | AOI-only | Vision IO |
|------|----------|-----------|
| 용도 | 검사 결과를 TMflow 변수로 반환 | 검사 결과를 디지털 IO로 출력 |
| 워크스페이스 | 불필요 | 불필요 |
| 활용 | 프로그램 분기 제어 | PLC/외부장치 연동 |

---

### 주의 사항

- TMvision 소프트웨어 버전에 따라 AOI 기능 목록이 다를 수 있음 (최신: 2.20, 2024-12-16)
- AI Vision (TM AI+ AOI Edge 등) 을 추가 설치하면 딥러닝 기반 색상/형상 검사 기능이 확장됨

---

### 출처

- [TMvision Software Manual v2.20 (2024-12-16)](https://uchimurarobotics.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/TM_Software_TMvision_2.20_1.00_EN.pdf)
- [Omron TM Collaborative Robot TMVision Software Manual I690-E-03](https://files.omron.eu/downloads/latest/manual/en/i690_tm_collaborative_robot_tmvision_software_manual_operation_manual_en.pdf?v=2)
- [TMvision Software Manual (RNA Automation, v1.68, 2018)](https://www.rnaautomation.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/TMvision-Software-Manual.pdf) - 오래된 자료(3년+), 기본 개념은 유효하나 UI 차이 주의
- [TM ROS v1 Vision Documentation](https://techman-robot-ros.readthedocs.io/en/latest/Vision.html)
- [Techman Robot 공식 문서 - TM Vision](https://www.tm-robot.com/en/docs-category/tm-vision/)
